title: suggest resolve CMD guard: word-boundary key extraction fix
desc: CMD guard extracts affected commands from suggest text using HasCmdToken helper that checks word boundary after match, preventing short CommandHelpMap keys (e.g. 'com') from false-positiving on longer words ('commands', '--commit') in suggest titles.
steps: Use HasCmdToken(text, prefix, key) instead of text.Contains(prefix+key): checks char after match is non-alphanumeric
Example false-positive fixed: 'a11y commands' no longer triggers key 'com' because 'commands'[3]='m' is alphanumeric
Example false-positive fixed: '--commit' no longer triggers key 'com'
Location: SuggestCommand.Resolve.cs, in 'Non-merge: extract mentioned commands from suggest text' block
If new short CommandHelpMap keys are added, word-boundary is already enforced -- no additional change needed
Fix location: SuggestCommand.Resolve.cs -- resolve guard pre-load block at lines ~204-217 (v6.2.1 commit e3724001)

requirements.expect: CMD guard does NOT extract 'com' from title containing 'commands'
CMD guard does NOT extract 'com' from title containing 'commands'
